purpose: Hero concept art for Meshy v6 image-to-3D conversion

assets.prompt: Full body character concept art of a fantasy prince in a golden carnival costume. He wears an ornate golden crown and holds a royal scepter topped with a decorative pastry-shaped head. Joyful but regal expression, warm smile, dark wavy hair. The costume is richly decorated with gold filigree and embroidery in gold, orange and red tones. Standing in a relaxed heroic pose, facing the viewer. Simple neutral grey gradient background. Digital painting style, semi-realistic fantasy RTS game character design, detailed armor and clothing, clear silhouette, full body from head to feet visible. No text, no frame.

Standing in a confident warrior pose, facing the viewer. Simple neutral grey gradient background. Digital painting style, semi-realistic fantasy RTS game character design, detailed clothing and equipment, clear silhouette, full body from head to feet visible. No text, no frame.
